title: ceraia marivelensis
intro: Ceraia marivelensis, also known as the "Golden Orchid," is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including hypertension, diabetes, and digestive problems, offering several health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and enhanced immune function. Ceraia marivelensis can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
